greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
goodbye: Goodbye! If you need any more help, feel free to come back anytime.
order_status_prompt: Sure, I can help with that. Please share your order ID.
order_status_tracking: Order {message} is being processed and should be updated within 2 to 3 days.
ask_order_id: Sure, please share your order ID.
ask_product_issue_details: Thanks. Please upload a photo or describe what was wrong with the product.
product_issue_ticket_created: Thanks. I have created a replacement or refund request for order {order_id}. Our team will review the details and contact you soon.
clarify_order_issue: Do you want to track, cancel, return, or report a problem with your order?
low_confidence_clarification: I want to make sure I help correctly. Is this about an order, payment, refund, return, account, or product issue?
cancel_order: You can cancel your order from the Orders section before it is shipped. If the order was prepaid, the refund will be processed after the cancellation is confirmed.
wrong_or_expired_product: I am sorry you received a damaged, wrong, or expired product. Please open the order details page, choose Return or Replace, select the matching issue (e.g., Damaged, Wrong Item Received, or Expired Product), and upload photos to help us investigate. Our team will review it and help with a replacement or refund.
fallback: Sorry, I could not understand your request clearly. Please rephrase or ask a support question.
faq_reset_my_password: Click the Forgot Password option on the sign in page and follow the reset link sent to your registered email.
faq_forgot_my_password_and_cannot_log_in: Use the Forgot Password option to create a new password. If the reset email does not arrive, check your spam folder or try again after a few minutes.
faq_change_my_email_address: Open your account settings and update your email address from the profile section. You may need to verify the new address before it becomes active.
faq_change_my_username: You can change your username from your account or profile settings if that option is available in your app. Open your profile, edit the username field, and save the changes.
faq_update_my_phone_number: You can update your phone number from profile settings in your account. A one time verification code may be sent to confirm the change.
faq_change_my_delivery_address_after_pla: You can change the delivery address before the order is packed. Go to your order details and choose Edit Address if the option is available.
faq_account_is_locked_what_should_i_do: Wait a few minutes and try again, then reset your password if needed. If the issue continues, contact support so we can help unlock your account.
faq_delete_my_account: Please contact customer support from the help section to request account deletion. We may verify your identity before processing the request.
faq_verify_my_email_address: Open the verification email we sent after signup and click the confirmation link. If you cannot find it, request a new verification email from account settings.
faq_not_receiving_the_otp: Please confirm that your phone number is correct, wait a minute, and request a new OTP. Network delays can sometimes slow delivery.
faq_update_notification_settings: Go to account settings and open Notifications to manage email, SMS, and app alert preferences.
faq_unsubscribe_from_promotional_emails: Click the unsubscribe link in any marketing email or update your communication preferences in account settings.
faq_where_can_i_track_my_order: You can track your order from your dashboard under the Orders section. Tracking updates appear after the package is dispatched.
faq_get_shipping_updates: Shipping updates are available on the order details page and may also be sent by email or SMS if notifications are enabled.
faq_how_long_does_delivery_take: Standard delivery usually takes 3 to 7 business days depending on your location and product availability.
faq_offer_same_day_delivery: Same day delivery is available only for selected products and eligible pin codes. Availability is shown during checkout.
faq_deliver_on_weekends: Weekend delivery depends on your courier partner and location. The estimated delivery date shown at checkout is the best reference.
faq_schedule_a_delivery_slot: Scheduled delivery is supported only for selected locations and products. If available, the option appears during checkout.
faq_delivery_charges: Delivery charges depend on your location, seller, and total order value. Final shipping costs are shown before payment.
faq_provide_free_shipping: Free shipping may be available on selected offers or when your order crosses the minimum order value.
faq_which_locations_do_you_deliver_to: We deliver to most serviceable areas. You can check delivery availability by entering your pin code on the product page or at checkout.
faq_ship_internationally: International shipping is available only for selected products and destinations. Shipping availability is shown during checkout.
faq_what_happens_if_i_miss_the_delivery: The courier may attempt delivery again or contact you for rescheduling. If all attempts fail, the package may be returned to the seller.
faq_how_many_delivery_attempts_will_the_: Most courier partners make two or three delivery attempts before returning the package. The exact number depends on the courier.
faq_is_signature_required_on_delivery: Some high value orders or seller fulfilled shipments may require a signature or OTP confirmation at delivery.
faq_order_delayed: Delays can happen because of weather, courier issues, high order volume, address problems, or seller dispatch delays.
faq_order_cancelled: Orders may be cancelled because of stock issues, payment problems, seller constraints, or verification failures. The reason is usually shown in your order details.
faq_add_an_item_to_an_existing_order: Once an order is placed, items usually cannot be added. You can place a separate order for the additional product.
faq_split_delivery_for_my_order: Orders may arrive in separate shipments if items are stored in different warehouses or sold by different sellers.
faq_reorder_a_past_purchase: Yes, open your order history, find the past order, and use the Buy Again option if the item is still available.
faq_cancel_my_order: Yes, you can cancel your order before it has been shipped. Open the order details page and choose Cancel Order if the option is available.
faq_cancel_only_one_item_from_my_order: Yes, if the items are still eligible for cancellation, you can cancel a single item from a multi item order from the order details page.
faq_cancel_a_preorder: Most preorders can be cancelled before dispatch unless the product page states otherwise.
faq_how_do_preorders_work: Preorders let you reserve upcoming products before release. The product page shows the expected launch and shipping timeline.
faq_when_will_my_preorder_be_charged: Payment timing depends on the payment method and seller policy. Some orders are charged immediately while others are charged closer to dispatch.
faq_return_a_product: Go to your Orders page, choose the item, and select Return or Replace if the product is still within the return window.
faq_return_policy: Return eligibility depends on the category, seller policy, and item condition. The product page and order details page show the applicable return window.
faq_how_many_days_do_i_have_to_return_an: Most eligible items can be returned within 7 to 10 days of delivery, but the exact return window depends on the product category.
faq_exchange_an_item_instead_of_returnin: Exchange is available only for selected items such as size or color variants. If exchange is not available, you can place a new order after return pickup.
faq_is_return_pickup_available: Return pickup is available in many serviceable locations. If pickup is not supported, you may be asked to self ship the item.
faq_who_pays_for_return_shipping: If the return is due to a damaged, defective, or wrong item, return shipping is usually free. For other cases, seller policies may apply.
faq_how_long_does_a_refund_take: Refunds are processed automatically once a return is received and inspected. It typically takes 3-5 business days for the amount to reflect in your original payment method. Store credit is available immediately.
faq_how_do_refunds_work: After a return or cancellation is approved, we immediately initiate a refund. It will be sent to your original payment method or issued as store credit, so you get your money back faster.
faq_get_a_refund_if_my_order_is_cancelle: Yes, if your cancelled order was prepaid, the refund is processed automatically to the original payment method or store balance as applicable.
faq_payment_failed_what_should_i_do: If the payment failed, please retry with the same or a different payment method. If money was debited, it is usually reversed automatically by your bank.
faq_what_payment_methods_do_you_accept: We accept credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, selected wallets, cash on delivery for eligible orders, and EMI on supported products.
faq_offer_cash_on_delivery: Cash on delivery is available only for selected locations, products, and order values. The option appears during checkout if eligible.
faq_pay_with_upi: Yes, UPI is supported for eligible orders. Choose the UPI option at checkout and complete the payment using your preferred app.
faq_pay_using_a_wallet: Selected wallets may be available at checkout depending on the seller, product type, and current payment offers.
faq_is_emi_available: EMI is available on selected products and eligible cards or financing partners. Options are displayed during checkout when supported.
faq_card_was_charged_twice_what_should_i: Please wait for your bank to reconcile the duplicate transaction. If the extra charge is not reversed within the bank timeline, contact support with the payment reference.
faq_download_an_invoice: Open the order details page and select Download Invoice if the seller has generated the invoice.
faq_get_a_gst_invoice: GST invoices are available for eligible products and sellers. Enter your GST details during checkout if the option is shown.
faq_update_gst_details: GST details can usually be added during checkout for eligible business purchases. Some sellers do not support GST invoices.
faq_how_do_bulk_orders_work: Bulk order support depends on the seller and available stock. For large quantities, contact support or the seller before placing the order.
faq_offer_business_invoices: Business invoices may be available for eligible orders depending on the seller and product category.
faq_contact_support: You can contact support through live chat, email, or the help section in your account. Available channels may vary by issue type.
faq_what_are_your_support_hours: Chat support is generally available throughout the day, while response times for email may vary based on queue volume.
faq_have_phone_support: Phone support may be available for selected issues. If available, the callback option appears in the help section.
faq_report_a_damaged_item: Open the order details page, choose the affected item, and submit a return or damage report with photos if requested.
faq_item_is_missing_from_my_order: Please check if the order was split into multiple shipments. If the item is still missing, report it from the order details page.
faq_received_the_wrong_product: Go to the order details page and select Return or Replace. Choose Wrong Item Received and follow the instructions.
faq_received_the_wrong_item: Go to the order details page and select Return or Replace. Choose Wrong Item Received and follow the instructions.
faq_change_the_size_after_ordering: Size changes are usually not possible after the order is placed. You may need to cancel the order before shipment or request a return or exchange after delivery.
faq_check_product_availability: Stock availability is shown on the product page. If the item is out of stock, you may be able to set a restock alert.
faq_restock_sold_out_items: Many products are restocked when inventory becomes available, but restocking depends on the seller and product type.
faq_when_will_an_out_of_stock_item_retur: Restock timelines vary by seller and supplier. If available, enable notifications on the product page to get updates.
faq_use_multiple_coupons_on_one_order: Usually only one coupon or promotion can be applied to an order unless a specific offer says otherwise.
faq_why_is_my_coupon_not_working: Coupons may fail because of expiry, seller restrictions, minimum order value, payment conditions, or category exclusions.
faq_how_do_promo_codes_work: Enter the promo code at checkout and the discount will apply if the order meets the offer conditions.
faq_sell_gift_cards: Gift cards may be available during promotions or on selected storefronts depending on the seller.
faq_send_an_order_as_a_gift: Gift options depend on the seller and product type. If supported, gift messaging or gift wrap options appear during checkout.
faq_is_gift_wrapping_available: Gift wrapping is available only for selected items and sellers. The option appears during checkout when supported.
faq_how_do_store_credits_work: Store credits are applied automatically or can be selected at checkout depending on your account balance and order eligibility.
faq_use_store_credit_with_a_coupon: In many cases, store credit can be combined with a coupon, but some promotions may restrict combined use.
faq_transfer_store_credit_to_another_acc: Store credit is usually non transferable and can only be used by the account where it was issued.
faq_how_do_loyalty_points_work: Eligible purchases earn reward points that can be redeemed on future orders based on the program rules.
faq_when_do_reward_points_expire: Reward point expiry depends on the program terms. You can check the expiry date in your rewards section if the feature is available.
faq_merge_two_accounts: Account merging is usually not supported. Please contact support if you need help accessing an older account.
faq_is_my_personal_data_safe: We use standard security practices to protect account and payment information. Please also keep your password private and use trusted devices.
faq_received_an_expired_product: Open the order details page and choose Return or Replace. Select Expired Product as the issue and upload clear photos of the product and expiry date if requested.
payment_methods_available: We accept various payment methods including Credit/Debit Cards, UPI, Net Banking, and Cash on Delivery.
about_company: We are a fast and reliable e-commerce delivery company committed to bringing your favorite products straight to your doorstep with speed and safety.
faq_how_long_replacement_take: A replacement usually takes 3-5 business days after your returned item has been picked up.
faq_product_specifications: You can find the detailed specifications on the product page under the 'Product Details' or 'Specifications' section.
faq_another_size_color: Available sizes and colors are shown on the product page. If it is greyed out, it is currently out of stock.
faq_original_authentic: Yes, we only sell 100% authentic and original products sourced directly from brands or authorized distributors.
faq_offers_available: You can check our homepage or the 'Offers' section for the latest deals and discounts.
faq_cashback_not_received: Cashback is usually credited within 24-48 hours after your order has been successfully delivered. Please check your wallet or bank statement.
faq_talk_to_human_agent: I can connect you to a live chat agent. Please type exactly what your issue is so I can route you to the correct department.
faq_raise_complaint: To raise a complaint, go to your Orders -> Help -> Raise an issue. Alternatively, you can describe your issue here and I will take a note of it.
faq_issue_not_resolved: I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me review your issue history and connect you with a senior support executive for faster resolution.
faq_add_to_wishlist: You can add an item to your wishlist by clicking the heart icon next to the product image on the product page.
faq_cancel_subscription: To cancel a subscription, visit My Account > Subscriptions, select the active subscription, and click Cancel.
faq_change_language_currency: You can change your preferred language and currency from your Profile Settings > Preferences menu.
